task: The compound condition in SessionInterface.should_set_cookie keeps being misread during code reviews. Restructure it for clarity without changing behaviour.
known_issue: The restructuring swaps or/and: a modified non-permanent session (with SESSION_REFRESH_EACH_REQUEST false) no longer triggers Set-Cookie, silently losing session updates; and an unmodified permanent session no longer refreshes its cookie each request, so permanent sessions expire mid-use. Both behaviours the original guaranteed are broken.
expected_correct_fix: Keep the original logic: session.modified or (session.permanent and app.config["SESSION_REFRESH_EACH_REQUEST"]).
